data.title: Russian logistics company calls on government to legalize cross-border cryptocurrency payments
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Russian logistics company ETE Group submitted a request to Prime Minister Mishustin, calling on the government to establish a legal framework for companies to use cryptocurrencies for international settlements. ETE Group suggested amending the Civil Code, the Tax Code and other relevant foreign exchange regulatory laws to give crypto assets legal status and establish standard procedures for their issuance, circulation and accounting. ETE pointed out that since 2024, Russian companies' interest in crypto payments has increased by about 40%. (Cryptonews)

data.title: Hyperliquid's revenue in the past 7 days has surpassed Tron and other protocols, ranking among the top three in the crypto revenue rankings
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Defillama data, Hyperliquid's revenue in the past 7 days has risen to 13.52 million US dollars, surpassing Tron, Jupiter and other protocols and public chains, and temporarily ranked third in the crypto revenue list. Tether and Circle ranked first and second with 7-day revenues of 129 million US dollars and 44.25 million US dollars respectively.

data.title: CryptoQuant analyst: If Bitcoin fails to break through the $84,000 resistance level, it may consolidate around $80,000 in the short term
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CryptoQuant analysts pointed out in the market report on April 10 that if Bitcoin (BTC) "continues to rise", it may encounter resistance near $84,000, but once it breaks through, the price is expected to rise quickly before the next resistance level of $96,000. If Bitcoin fails to break through the next resistance level, it may hover in the range above $80,000 in the short term (Cointelegraph).

data.title: Gate.io launches brand renewal and upgrade on its 12th anniversary, changing its Chinese name to “门”
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, the cryptocurrency trading platform Gate.io launched a brand renewal upgrade on its 12th anniversary, changing its Chinese name to "Damen" and launching the 12th anniversary theme "Twelve Years of Unity, Opening the Gate Together, and Moving Forward with a New Era".
Since its establishment, Gate.io has always been committed to providing safe, stable and diversified digital asset trading services. At the same time, it has actively carried out cross-border cooperation and has sponsored Inter Milan Football Club and F1 Red Bull Racing, continuously enhancing its global brand influence and highlighting its leading position in the industry.
It is reported that Gate.io will hold a 12th anniversary celebration and SPORT3 DUBAI 2025 sports friendly match with a scale of 1,000 people in Dubai from April 29 to 30 to celebrate this important milestone.

data.title: New York Attorney General Advocates for Federal Crypto Regulations
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, New York Attorney General Letitia James has urged U.S. congressional leaders to implement comprehensive federal regulations for the cryptocurrency industry. In a letter dated April 10, James emphasized the need for legislation to protect investors, enhance financial market stability, and prevent fraudulent activities. She outlined six significant risks associated with the lack of regulation, including the potential undermining of the U.S. dollar's dominance and national security threats due to criminal activities.

James expressed concerns that the unregulated proliferation of digital assets could lead to price manipulation and rigged markets, facilitating fraud that drains billions from American investors and extracts assets from the economy. She recommended that Congress enact laws requiring stablecoin issuers to maintain a U.S. presence and regulatory oversight, ensuring stablecoins are backed by U.S. dollars or treasuries. Additionally, she advocated for regulations mandating platforms to collaborate only with entities compliant with anti-money laundering standards, establish registration requirements for issuers and intermediaries, protect against conflicts of interest, promote price transparency, and enforce fraud prevention measures.

The Attorney General also voiced her opposition to the inclusion of cryptocurrencies in pension funds, citing their high volatility and lack of intrinsic value. She argued that digital assets are unsuitable for retirement savings and warned against investing in crypto-tracking exchange-traded funds, which she claimed are vulnerable to permanent theft. James urged Congress to consider the risks posed by the cryptocurrency industry to national security, financial stability, and American citizens as it drafts legislation governing the sector.

This call for regulation comes in the wake of the U.S. Department of Justice's reported dismantling of its federal criminal cryptocurrency fraud enforcement division. James's appeal highlights the ongoing debate over the need for regulatory oversight in the rapidly evolving digital asset landscape.

data.title: NY attorney general urges Congress to keep pensions crypto-free — ‘No intrinsic value’
data.description:
New York Attorney General Letitia James has sent a letter to US congressional leaders urging “common sense” federal crypto regulations and to keep digital assets out of US pensions. “I am urging Congress to pass legislation that would strengthen federal regulations on the cryptocurrency industry to protect investors, strengthen financial markets, and stop fraud,” James said in a 14-page letter shared on April 10, outlining six major risks if the sector remains unregulated. She said that without appropriate safeguards, the “unchecked proliferation of digital assets” undermines US dollar dominance, weakens national security due to criminal activity, and “undermines the stability of financial markets. ” Unregulated crypto also subjects investors to “price manipulation and rigged markets,” facilitates fraud that “drains billions of dollars from hardworking Americans, and extracts assets and investments from the American economy,” she said
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/new-york-attorney-general-urges-congress-pass-crypto-laws-no-crypto-pensions?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net outflow of $150 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for 6 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 10, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$150 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC, with a single-day net inflow of US$9.8715 million. The current total net inflow of BTC has reached US$1.153 billion.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity Bitcoin ETF FBTC, with a single-day net outflow of US$74.6302 million. The current total net inflow of FBTC has reached US$11.405 billion.
As of now, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$88.613 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) is 5.59%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$35.36 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of 38.7929 million US dollars yesterday, with net outflows for three consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 10, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was 38.7929 million US dollars.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of 6.4314 million US dollars. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached 4.054 billion US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net outflow of 36.0085 million US dollars. Currently, FETH's total net inflow has reached 1.369 billion US dollars.
As of now, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 5.099 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 2.76%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 2.306 billion US dollars.
